background: Suppose there are 100 items in the lot and their manufacturer claims that no more than 2% are defective. When the shipment is received at an assembly plant, a quality control manager asks his staff to take a random sample of size 10 from it without replacement and will accept the lot if there are at most 1 defective item in the sample. If let say 2% are defective in the entire lot, then it consists of 2 defective items.

task.query: What is the probability that the manager will accept the lot?

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 2: Distribution Functions and Its Applications
